question: Accident IDs list karo un sabhi accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya 2 se zyada ho aur jo driver involved hai uske paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ACCIDENT_ID FROM FACT_ACCIDENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DRIVER AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID WHERE T1.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES > 2 AND T2.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr';
predicted_sql:
SELECT fa.ACCIDENT_ID
FROM FACT_ACCIDENT fa
JOIN DIM_DRIVER dd ON fa.DRIVER_ID = dd.DRIVER_ID
WHERE fa.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES > 2
AND dd.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE ILIKE '1-2yr';
raw_output:
SELECT fa.ACCIDENT_ID
FROM FACT_ACCIDENT fa
JOIN DIM_DRIVER dd ON fa.DRIVER_ID = dd.DRIVER_ID
WHERE fa.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES > 2
AND dd.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE ILIKE '1-2yr';

question: Har accident severity ke liye total accident IDs ka count dikhao un drivers ke liye jinke paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience hai, lekin sirf un severity levels ko show karo jinke paas ek se zyada accidents hain, aur results ko accident severity ke according order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY, COUNT(T1.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM FACT_ACCIDENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DRIVER AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID WHERE T2.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr' GROUP BY T1.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY HAVING COUNT(T1.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T1.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY
predicted_sql:
SELECT fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY, COUNT(fa.ACCIDENT_ID) AS total_accidents
FROM FACT_ACCIDENT fa
JOIN DIM_DRIVER dd ON fa.DRIVER_ID = dd.DRIVER_ID
WHERE dd.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr'
GROUP BY fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY
HAVING COUNT(fa.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1
ORDER BY fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY;
raw_output:
SELECT fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY, COUNT(fa.ACCIDENT_ID) AS total_accidents
FROM FACT_ACCIDENT fa
JOIN DIM_DRIVER dd ON fa.DRIVER_ID = dd.DRIVER_ID
WHERE dd.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr'
GROUP BY fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY
HAVING COUNT(fa.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1
ORDER BY fa.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY;

question: Driver ke har age band ke liye, age band ko list karo, average number of casualties ko, aur total count of accident IDs ko, filtering karte hue un groups ke liye jahan average number of casualties ek se zyada ho, aur results ko accident count ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER HAVING AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties,
    COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) AS total_accidents
FROM 
    DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
HAVING 
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) > 1
ORDER BY 
    total_accidents DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties,
    COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) AS total_accidents
FROM 
    DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
HAVING 
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) > 1
ORDER BY 
    total_accidents DESC;

question: Casualty IDs ko list karo un casualties ke liye jo pedestrians classify hain jahan casualty ki fitness normal hai, aur unhe casualty ID ke basis par group karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_ID FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' GROUP BY T1.CASUALTY_ID HAVING T1.FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal';
predicted_sql:
SELECT CASUALTY_ID
FROM DIM_CASUALTY
WHERE CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' AND FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal'
GROUP BY CASUALTY_ID;
raw_output:
SELECT CASUALTY_ID
FROM DIM_CASUALTY
WHERE CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' AND FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal'
GROUP BY CASUALTY_ID;

question: Casualty ID, casualty class, casualty ka sex, aur accident severity dikhao un casualties ke liye jo 'Pedestrian' classify hain aur jinhe 'Normal' fitness level hai. Ensure karo ki har casualty ke paas kam se kam ek accident associated ho, aur results ko casualty class ke hisaab se order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_ID, T1.CASUALTY_CLASS, T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T3.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 INNER JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' AND T1.FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal' GROUP BY T1.CASUALTY_ID, T1.CASUALTY_CLASS, T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T3.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY HAVING COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.CASUALTY_CLASS ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    c.CASUALTY_ID,
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS,
    c.SEX_OF_CASUALTY,
    a.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY
FROM 
    DIM_CASUALTY c
JOIN 
    BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY b ON c.CASUALTY_ID = b.CASUALTY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT a ON b.ACCIDENT_ID = a.ACCIDENT_ID
WHERE 
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' 
    AND c.FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal'
ORDER BY 
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    c.CASUALTY_ID,
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS,
    c.SEX_OF_CASUALTY,
    a.ACCIDENT_SEVERITY
FROM 
    DIM_CASUALTY c
JOIN 
    BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY b ON c.CASUALTY_ID = b.CASUALTY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT a ON b.ACCIDENT_ID = a.ACCIDENT_ID
WHERE 
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' 
    AND c.FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal'
ORDER BY 
    c.CASUALTY_CLASS;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 120. Pred count: 4128.

gold_sql: SELECT * FROM DIM_CASUALTY WHERE CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' AND FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal';

question: Driver ke age band ko list karo aur har age band ke liye average number of casualties dikhao, sorted by average number of casualties descending order mein, sirf top 5 results dikha ke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties
FROM 
    DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
ORDER BY 
    avg_casualties DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties
FROM 
    DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN 
    FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
ORDER BY 
    avg_casualties DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Casualty ka sex, casualty ka age band, aur casualty ka work status dikhao, saath mein har group ke liye average casualty severity bhi dikhao, jahan average casualty severity 1 se zyada ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_CASUALTY, T1.WORK_OF_CASUALTY, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID GROUP BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_CASUALTY, T1.WORK_OF_CASUALTY HAVING AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) > 1

question: Driver ke age band ko dikhao, average casualties ki sankhya, aur casualty severity, sab ko group karo driver age band aur casualty severity ke hisaab se, sirf un groups ke liye jahan average casualties ek se zyada ho, aur top 5 results ko list karo average casualties ke descending order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY HAVING AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Casualty ke sex, age band, aur work status ko list karo, saath mein casualty severity bhi dikhao, aur severity level ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_CASUALTY, T1.WORK_OF_CASUALTY, T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID ORDER BY T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY DESC

question: Driver ke age band ko list karo, average casualties ki sankhya, aur total casualty severity ka sum dikhao. Top 5 driver age bands ke liye jo ek se zyada accidents hain, unhe average casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), SUM(T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER HAVING COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Driver ke har age band ke liye, age band ko list karo, average number of casualties ko dikhao, aur total count of accident IDs ko batao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER

question: Casualty ka sex aur average casualty severity dikhao un casualties ke liye jo driver, rider, ya pedestrian hain aur jinki age 18-30 ya 31-50 ke beech mein hai. Results ko sex ke hisaab se group karo, jahan average severity 1 se zyada ho, aur results ko average casualty severity ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 INNER JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS IN ('Driver or rider', 'Pedestrian') AND T1.AGE_BAND_OF_CASUALTY IN ('31-50', '18-30') GROUP BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY HAVING AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) DESC

question: Pedestrians ke roop mein classified casualties ke liye, har sex ke casualties ko list karo unke saath average casualty severity ke saath, grouped by casualty ka sex.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' GROUP BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY

question: Casualty class aur average casualty severity ko list karo har ek casualty class ke liye, average casualty severity ke basis par descending order mein sort karke, sirf top 10 results dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_CLASS, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID GROUP BY T1.CASUALTY_CLASS ORDER BY AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Accident IDs list karo un cases ke liye jahan drivers ke paas 1-2 years ka driving experience ho, aur jahan har accident ke liye total casualties ka sum 3 se zyada ho, aur result ko maximum casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.ACCIDENT_ID FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID LEFT JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID WHERE T1.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr' GROUP BY T2.ACCIDENT_ID HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) > 3 ORDER BY MAX(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC

question: Har casualty ke liye sex, age band, aur work status ko list karo, unke casualty severity ke saath, aur casualty ke severity ke basis par descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_CASUALTY, T1.WORK_OF_CASUALTY, T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID ORDER BY T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY DESC

question: Top 5 age bands aur casualty severities ko dikhao jinke paas sabse zyada average number of casualties hai. Har group ke liye age band, average number of casualties, aur casualty severity dikha.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Casualty class aur har class ke liye average casualty severity dikhao, highest se lowest average severity ke hisaab se order karte hue, aur sirf top 10 results dikha.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_CLASS, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID GROUP BY T1.CASUALTY_CLASS ORDER BY AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Casualty class aur har casualty class ke liye average casualty severity dikhao, aur unhe average severity ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo, aur sirf top 10 results dikhao.

question: Casualty ID aur casualty ke sex ko list karo un sabhi individuals ke liye jo pedestrians classify hote hain aur jinka fitness normal record hua hai, unhe alphabetically order karo unke sex ke basis par.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_ID, T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' AND T1.FITNESS_OF_CASUALTY = 'Normal' ORDER BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY ASC

question: Accident IDs list karo un accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya 2 se zyada ho aur jo driver involved hai uske paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience ho.

question: Casualty classes ko list karo jahan average casualty severity 1 se zyada ho, aur unhe average severity ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo, aur sirf top 10 results dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CASUALTY_CLASS FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID GROUP BY T1.CASUALTY_CLASS HAVING AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Driver ke age band ke hisaab se group karke, batao age band kya hai, average casualties kitni hain, aur un drivers ke liye unique accident IDs ka total count kitna hai jinhe ek se zyada accidents mein involve hona pada hai, aur result ko average casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), COUNT(DISTINCT T2.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER HAVING COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC

question: Pedestrians ke roop mein classify kiye gaye casualties ke liye, har ek sex ke casualties ko list karo aur unka corresponding average casualty severity dikhao. Sirf un groups ko filter karo jahan average severity 1 se zyada ho, aur results ko sex of casualty ke hisaab se order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY, AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) FROM DIM_CASUALTY AS T1 JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T2 ON T1.CASUALTY_ID = T2.CASUALTY_ID WHERE T1.CASUALTY_CLASS = 'Pedestrian' GROUP BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY HAVING AVG(T2.CASUALTY_SEVERITY) > 1 ORDER BY T1.SEX_OF_CASUALTY
